member.name: T:Synthwave.Android.MainActivity
member.summary: The main activity for the Android application. It initializes the game instance, sets up the rendering view, and starts the game loop.
member.remarks: This class is responsible for managing the Android activity lifecycle and integrating with the MonoGame framework.

member.name: M:Synthwave.Android.MainActivity.OnCreate(Android.OS.Bundle)
member.summary: Called when the activity is first created. Initializes the game instance, retrieves its rendering view, and sets it as the content view of the activity. Finally, starts the game loop.
member.param: A Bundle containing the activity's previously saved state, if any.
